_comment: Per-symbol news detail + REAL publication time. Read by build_dashboard.py; surfaces on each stock's detail page. See ./docs/NEWS_TIME_SPEC.md for the publishedAt format spec. Copy this file to ./news_detail.json (repo root) and populate during Phase 8 of /SIPs.

TICKER.detail:
Multi-paragraph 繁體中文 markdown. Paragraphs separated by (single becomes
). Length: ~150-400 chars / 3-6 short paragraphs.
